case_title: GUSTAVO LINO VS. ZENANLI PARKING INC.

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:NUTETTIN BASAR) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LINO, GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT ZENANLI PARKING INC.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LINO, GUSTAVO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZENANLI PARKING INC. $981.11 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,026.11 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $981.11 FILED BY LINO, GUSTAVO AS TO DEFENDANT ZENANLI PARKING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-12-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ERKAN CAKIR---MANAGER. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE IN COURT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ZENANLI PARKING INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.
